title: Hornlee-based FC Rebels soccer team aim for stronger showing
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Hornlee-based FC Rebels...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Hornlee-based FC Rebels are hopeful of a stronger showing in the 2025/26 Safa Eden Regional Men's League after spending several seasons fighting relegation.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Hornlee-based FC Rebels are hopeful of a stronger showing in the 2025/26 Safa Eden Regional Men's League after spending several seasons fighting relegation."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Head coach Testony \"Rasta\" Sinclair, who took over full-time duties early last season, believes stability and renewed focus can help turn their fortunes around."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His coaching journey began while serving as a player-coach, learning from experienced mentors along the way.","html":"His coaching journey began while serving as a player-coach, learning from experienced mentors along the way."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Rebels were promoted to the Safa Eden Elite Regional Men's League in the 2022/23 season and, despite league struggles, have enjoyed success in cup competitions, winning both the Easter Soccer Tournament and Oyster Festival titles.","html":"Rebels were promoted to the Safa Eden Elite Regional Men's League in the 2022/23 season and, despite league struggles, have enjoyed success in cup competitions, winning both the Easter Soccer Tournament and Oyster Festival titles."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sinclair praised his players, supporters and club management for their continued commitment and trust, describing the fans as the team's \"12th man\".","html":"Sinclair praised his players, supporters and club management for their continued commitment and trust, describing the fans as the team's \"12th man\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He also highlighted the club's talented young goalkeepers, noting their potential to reach higher levels with consistent training and discipline.","html":"He also highlighted the club's talented young goalkeepers, noting their potential to reach higher levels with consistent training and discipline."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Hornlee-based FC Rebels soccer team aim for stronger showing
